text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 156 

MDC_CD 

LABEL: Major Diagnostic Category (MDC) Code 

DESCRIPTION: Three-digit numeric code that groups beneficiary diagnosis codes into broad categories based on 
condition type and body region. 

SHORT NAME: MDC_CD 

LONG NAME: MDC_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 

VALUES: 000 = Ungroupable 
001 = Nervous System 
002 =
